'''dochazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iliococcygeal|iliococcygeal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iliococcygeal|iliococcygeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dochazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazhithi|dochazhithi]] || [[word:dochazhiji|dochazhiji]] || [[word:dochazhishi|dochazhishi]] || [[word:dochazhiki|dochazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazhuthuthu|dochazhuthuthu]] || [[word:dochazhujuju|dochazhujuju]] || [[word:dochazhushushu|dochazhushushu]] || [[word:dochazhukuku|dochazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazhuthu|dochazhuthu]] || [[word:dochazhuju|dochazhuju]] || [[word:dochazhushu|dochazhushu]] || [[word:dochazhuku|dochazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazhufthuf|dochazhufthuf]] || [[word:dochazhufjuf|dochazhufjuf]] || [[word:dochazhufshuf|dochazhufshuf]] || [[word:dochazhufkuf|dochazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazhethe|dochazhethe]] || [[word:dochazheje|dochazheje]] || [[word:dochazheshe|dochazheshe]] || [[word:dochazheke|dochazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazhothotho|dochazhothotho]] || [[word:dochazhojojo|dochazhojojo]] || [[word:dochazhoshosho|dochazhoshosho]] || [[word:dochazhokoko|dochazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazhotho|dochazhotho]] || [[word:dochazhojo|dochazhojo]] || [[word:dochazhosho|dochazhosho]] || [[word:dochazhoko|dochazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazhofthof|dochazhofthof]] || [[word:dochazhofjof|dochazhofjof]] || [[word:dochazhofshof|dochazhofshof]] || [[word:dochazhofkof|dochazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazhĂŠthĂŠ|dochazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dochazhĂŠjĂŠ|dochazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dochazhĂŠshĂŠ|dochazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dochazhĂŠkĂŠ|dochazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazhathatha|dochazhathatha]] || [[word:dochazhajaja|dochazhajaja]] || [[word:dochazhashasha|dochazhashasha]] || [[word:dochazhakaka|dochazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazhatha|dochazhatha]] || [[word:dochazhaja|dochazhaja]] || [[word:dochazhasha|dochazhasha]] || [[word:dochazhaka|dochazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazhafthaf|dochazhafthaf]] || [[word:dochazhafjaf|dochazhafjaf]] || [[word:dochazhafshaf|dochazhafshaf]] || [[word:dochazhafkaf|dochazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dochazhasha|dochazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochazhshĂ«asha|dochazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochazhroasha|dochazhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochazhmuasha|dochazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochazhyaasha|dochazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochazhnkshĂ«asha|godochazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochazhnkroasha|godochazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochazhnkmuasha|godochazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochazhnkyaasha|godochazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dochachazhasha|dochachazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochachazhshĂ«asha|dochachazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochachazhroasha|dochachazhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochachazhmuasha|dochachazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochachazhyaasha|dochachazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochachazhnkshĂ«asha|godochachazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochachazhnkroasha|godochachazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochachazhnkmuasha|godochachazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochachazhnkyaasha|godochachazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dechĂŠzhasha|dechĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dechĂŠzhshĂ«asha|dechĂŠzhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dechĂŠzhroasha|dechĂŠzhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dechĂŠzhmuasha|dechĂŠzhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dechĂŠzhyaasha|dechĂŠzhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godechĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha|godechĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godechĂŠzhnkroasha|godechĂŠzhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godechĂŠzhnkmuasha|godechĂŠzhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godechĂŠzhnkyaasha|godechĂŠzhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dochfazhasha|dochfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochfazhshĂ«asha|dochfazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochfazhroasha|dochfazhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochfazhmuasha|dochfazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochfazhyaasha|dochfazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochfazhnkshĂ«asha|godochfazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochfazhnkroasha|godochfazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochfazhnkmuasha|godochfazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochfazhnkyaasha|godochfazhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
